channel.title: Ounces Taproom & Beer Garden
channel.description: Upcoming events for Ounces Taproom & Beer Garden

item.title: Books & Brews READ-A-THON
item.description:
Saturday, April 25, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Ounces Taproom & Beer Garden, 3809 Delridge Way SW, Seattle, WA, 98126

Bring your kids and a book to read or swap! Then grab some drinks and lunch for you and the family and settle in for a fun afternoon of reading and community – all to benefit Pathfinder K-8!

Event details
